---
title: "SKMGN Transcriptomics Overview"
author: "Christopher Jin"
date: "Last compiled `r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{SKMGN Transcriptomics Overview}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 5
)
```

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(Biobase)
library(dplyr)
library(edgeR)
library(ggplot2)
library(MotrpacRatTraining6moMuscleData)
```

`TRNSCRPT_GN` contains gastrocnemius RNA-seq count data stored as an `ExpressionSet`. Counts are stored as-is in `exprs()`; log2-CPM values are computed prior to PCA.

# Data Summary

```{r}
eset = TRNSCRPT_GN

cat("Features:", nrow(eset), "\n")
cat("Samples: ", ncol(eset), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Sample breakdown by sex and timepoint
table(pData(eset)$sex, pData(eset)$timepoint)
```

# PCA

Counts are converted to log2-CPM before PCA. All features with no missing values are used.

```{r}
mat = cpm(exprs(eset), log = TRUE)
mat_complete = mat[complete.cases(mat), ]
cat("Features used for PCA:", nrow(mat_complete), "\n")

pca_res = prcomp(t(mat_complete), center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)
var_exp = summary(pca_res)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100

pd = as.data.frame(pData(eset))

pca_df = as.data.frame(pca_res$x[, 1:2])
pca_df$viallabel = rownames(pca_df)

pca_df = pca_df %>%
  left_join(pd[, c("viallabel", "sex", "timepoint")], by = "viallabel") %>%
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("SED", "1W", "2W", "4W", "8W")))
```

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = sex, shape = timepoint, label = viallabel)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(size = 2, vjust = -0.6, show.legend = FALSE, check_overlap = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Female" = "#E7298A", "Male" = "#1B9E77")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("SED" = 16, "1W" = 17, "2W" = 15, "4W" = 18, "8W" = 8)) +
  labs(
    x = sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%%)", var_exp[1]),
    y = sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%%)", var_exp[2]),
    color = "Sex",
    shape = "Timepoint",
    title = "TRNSCRPT_GN PCA"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
# ggsave(filename = file.path(here(), "plots", "pcas", "trnscrpt_gn.pdf"))

```

# Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
